name: 21″ Club Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the milk, cream, salt, vanilla bean and 3/4 cup of the sugar. Bring to a boil.
2. Stir in the rice. Allow the mixture to simmer gently, covered, for 1 3/4 hours over a very low flame until rice is soft.
3. Remove from the heat and let cool slightly. Remove the vanilla bean.
4. Blend well and stir in the remaining 1/4 cup of sugar and egg yolk. Let cool more.
5. Preheat the broiler.
6. Stir in all but 2 tablespoons of the whipped cream into the pudding mixture.
7. Pour into individual serving dishes or a souffle dish. (Raisins may be placed at the bottom if desired.)
8. Spread remaining whipped cream over top and place under the broiler until lightly browned.
9. Chill before serving.
